libsource.description:
Arduino R3 Shield Footprint with ICSP Header Includes pins for 6-pin (2x3) ICSP Header. Compatible with Leonardo boards that require SPI pin connections via this header. SparkFun Products:
  • CryptoShield
  • microSD Shield
  • R3 Stackable Headers Kit
Generic screw terminal, single row, 01x04, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic screw terminal, single row, 01x04, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)

SparkFun I2C Standard Pinout Header SparkFun has standardized on a pinout for all I2C based sensor breakouts.

This pinout allows I2C boards to be plugged directly into the headers on Arduino Uno compatible boards, andto be daisy chained easily. Example SparkFun Products:
  • SparkFun Atmospheric Sensor Breakout - BME280
  • SparkFun Altitude/Pressure Sensor Breakout - MPL3115A2
  • SparkFun TOF Range Finder Sensor - VL6180
Generic connector, single row, 01x03, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x03, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x03, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x03, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)

SparkFun I2C Standard Pinout Header SparkFun has standardized on a pinout for all I2C based sensor breakouts.

This pinout allows I2C boards to be plugged directly into the headers on Arduino Uno compatible boards, andto be daisy chained easily. Example SparkFun Products:
  • SparkFun Atmospheric Sensor Breakout - BME280
  • SparkFun Altitude/Pressure Sensor Breakout - MPL3115A2
  • SparkFun TOF Range Finder Sensor - VL6180

SparkFun I2C Standard Pinout Header SparkFun has standardized on a pinout for all I2C based sensor breakouts.

This pinout allows I2C boards to be plugged directly into the headers on Arduino Uno compatible boards, andto be daisy chained easily. Example SparkFun Products:
  • SparkFun Atmospheric Sensor Breakout - BME280
  • SparkFun Altitude/Pressure Sensor Breakout - MPL3115A2
  • SparkFun TOF Range Finder Sensor - VL6180

Standard text-only 16x2 parallel input LCD Basic 16 character by 2 line display. Typically utilizes the extremely common HD44780 parallel interface chipset SparkFun Products:
  • Basic 16x2 Green
  • Basic 8x2 Green

Multi connection point. Often used as Generic Header-pin footprint for 0.1 inch spaced/style header connections On any of the 0.1 inch spaced packages, you can populate with these:
  • Break Away Headers - Straight (PRT-00116)
  • Break Away Male Headers - Right Angle (PRT-00553)
  • Female Headers (PRT-00115)
  • Break Away Headers - Machine Pin (PRT-00117)
  • Break Away Female Headers - Swiss Machine Pin (PRT-00743)
For SCREWTERMINALS and SPRING TERMINALS visit here:
  • Screw Terimnals on SparkFun.com (5mm/3.5mm/2.54mm spacing)
This device is also useful as a general connection point to wire up your design to another part of your project. Our various solder wires solder well into these plated through hole pads.
  • Hook-Up Wire - Assortment (Stranded, 22 AWG) (PRT-11375)
  • Hook-Up Wire - Assortment (Solid Core, 22 AWG) (PRT-11367)
  • View the entire wire category on our website here
Special notes: Molex polarized connector foot print use with SKU : PRT-08231 with associated crimp pins and housings. 1MM SMD Version SKU: PRT-10208

Multi connection point. Often used as Generic Header-pin footprint for 0.1 inch spaced/style header connections On any of the 0.1 inch spaced packages, you can populate with these:
  • Break Away Headers - Straight (PRT-00116)
  • Break Away Male Headers - Right Angle (PRT-00553)
  • Female Headers (PRT-00115)
  • Break Away Headers - Machine Pin (PRT-00117)
  • Break Away Female Headers - Swiss Machine Pin (PRT-00743)
For SCREWTERMINALS and SPRING TERMINALS visit here:
  • Screw Terimnals on SparkFun.com (5mm/3.5mm/2.54mm spacing)
This device is also useful as a general connection point to wire up your design to another part of your project. Our various solder wires solder well into these plated through hole pads.
  • Hook-Up Wire - Assortment (Stranded, 22 AWG) (PRT-11375)
  • Hook-Up Wire - Assortment (Solid Core, 22 AWG) (PRT-11367)
  • View the entire wire category on our website here
Special notes: Molex polarized connector foot print use with SKU : PRT-08231 with associated crimp pins and housings. 1MM SMD Version SKU: PRT-10208
8 Bit Port/Expander, I2C SMBUS, Interrupt output, TSSOP-16, SOIC-16
Generic screw terminal, single row, 01x04, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x03, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x03, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x03, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)

fields.field: IC OR CTRLR SRC SELECT TSOT23-6

libsource.description: IC OR CTRLR SRC SELECT TSOT23-6
Generic connector, single row, 01x03, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)

Multi connection point. Often used as Generic Header-pin footprint for 0.1 inch spaced/style header connections On any of the 0.1 inch spaced packages, you can populate with these:
  • Break Away Headers - Straight (PRT-00116)
  • Break Away Male Headers - Right Angle (PRT-00553)
  • Female Headers (PRT-00115)
  • Break Away Headers - Machine Pin (PRT-00117)
  • Break Away Female Headers - Swiss Machine Pin (PRT-00743)
For SCREWTERMINALS and SPRING TERMINALS visit here:
  • Screw Terimnals on SparkFun.com (5mm/3.5mm/2.54mm spacing)
This device is also useful as a general connection point to wire up your design to another part of your project. Our various solder wires solder well into these plated through hole pads.
  • Hook-Up Wire - Assortment (Stranded, 22 AWG) (PRT-11375)
  • Hook-Up Wire - Assortment (Solid Core, 22 AWG) (PRT-11367)
  • View the entire wire category on our website here
Special notes: Molex polarized connector foot print use with SKU : PRT-08231 with associated crimp pins and housings. 1MM SMD Version SKU: PRT-10208
Generic connector, single row, 01x03, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, double row, 02x04, odd/even pin numbering scheme (row 1 odd numbers, row 2 even numbers), script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x02, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x02, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic screw terminal, single row, 01x04, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x02, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
8 Bit Port/Expander, I2C SMBUS, Interrupt output, TSSOP-16, SOIC-16

Generic connector, single row, 01x04, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)

libpart.description: Generic connector, single row, 01x02, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)

8 Bit Port/Expander, I2C SMBUS, Interrupt output, TSSOP-16, SOIC-16

Arduino R3 Shield Footprint with ICSP Header Includes pins for 6-pin (2x3) ICSP Header. Compatible with Leonardo boards that require SPI pin connections via this header. SparkFun Products:
  • CryptoShield
  • microSD Shield
  • R3 Stackable Headers Kit

Multi connection point. Often used as Generic Header-pin footprint for 0.1 inch spaced/style header connections On any of the 0.1 inch spaced packages, you can populate with these:
  • Break Away Headers - Straight (PRT-00116)
  • Break Away Male Headers - Right Angle (PRT-00553)
  • Female Headers (PRT-00115)
  • Break Away Headers - Machine Pin (PRT-00117)
  • Break Away Female Headers - Swiss Machine Pin (PRT-00743)
For SCREWTERMINALS and SPRING TERMINALS visit here:
  • Screw Terimnals on SparkFun.com (5mm/3.5mm/2.54mm spacing)
This device is also useful as a general connection point to wire up your design to another part of your project. Our various solder wires solder well into these plated through hole pads.
  • Hook-Up Wire - Assortment (Stranded, 22 AWG) (PRT-11375)
  • Hook-Up Wire - Assortment (Solid Core, 22 AWG) (PRT-11367)
  • View the entire wire category on our website here
Special notes: Molex polarized connector foot print use with SKU : PRT-08231 with associated crimp pins and housings. 1MM SMD Version SKU: PRT-10208

SparkFun I2C Standard Pinout Header SparkFun has standardized on a pinout for all I2C based sensor breakouts.

This pinout allows I2C boards to be plugged directly into the headers on Arduino Uno compatible boards, andto be daisy chained easily. Example SparkFun Products:
  • SparkFun Atmospheric Sensor Breakout - BME280
  • SparkFun Altitude/Pressure Sensor Breakout - MPL3115A2
  • SparkFun TOF Range Finder Sensor - VL6180

Standard text-only 16x2 parallel input LCD Basic 16 character by 2 line display. Typically utilizes the extremely common HD44780 parallel interface chipset SparkFun Products:
  • Basic 16x2 Green
  • Basic 8x2 Green

fields.field: IC OR CTRLR SRC SELECT TSOT23-6
